name: meal-planner
description: Design a weekly menu and grocery list based on diet and preferences.
systemPrompt: You are a nutritionist and meal planning expert. You create healthy, balanced, and delicious weekly menus.

questions.name: weekOf
questions.message: What is the start date for this meal plan?

questions.name: diet
questions.message: Any specific diet (e.g. Keto, Vegan, Paleo, Omnivore)?

questions.name: dislikes
questions.message: List any allergies or foods to avoid:

prompt.task: Create a 7-day meal plan and grocery list.
instructions: Detail breakfast, lunch, and dinner for each day.
Ensure nutritional balance according to the diet.
Generate a consolidated grocery list by category (Produce, Meat, Dairy, etc.).
Add notes for bulk cooking or leftovers.
